game_info.title: Stickman Fury
game_info.concept:
The world's fastest brawler is back. Experience cinematic kung-fu in the most epic stickman fighter ever made. Staying true to the original, you play with only two buttons. Every press matters, do not button mash! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/980300/One_Finger_Death_Punch_2/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ The world's fastest brawler is back. Experience cinematic kung-fu in the most epic stickman fighter ever made. Staying true to the original, you play with only two buttons. Every press matters, do not button mash!

Simplicity to perfection.

To be played in bursts.

By design, there is no story.

Only crazy kung-fu.





You're surrounded, outnumbered and have to use any weapon you can get your hands on to dismantle your opponents in a flurry of kung fu. That's the essence of OFDP2, the world's fastest brawler. It features the original OFDP's unique two-button mechanics which we've spent the last five years perfecting. Speed and precision are key in this whirlwind fighting frenzy, as players maintain control over the 26 different unlockable skills, frenetic gameplay, and classic kung fu-inspired animations.

ATTACK LEFT or ATTACK RIGHT




We want to show that a fighting game can be complex without cumbersome button combinations. Once players complete the tutorial levels and learn the basics, they'll see that this is the most intense two-button game ever made.

With 1000 different animations available, literally, anything is possible—particularly when players unlock each of the 26 available skills. Having these skills available simultaneously is a major design challenge that encompasses the core of what OFDP2 is trying to achieve. Seeing the game with all 26 skills is a spectacle unique to OFDP2.

We built this game as a palette cleanser between other games in your library. It was designed to deliver a quick hit of adrenalin as fast as possible.

You can't get a feel for the gameplay from watching videos. The flow of combat is something we spent years tweaking. It's what makes OFDP2 unique. Only by playing it will this become clear. That's why it's important to us that you TRY THE DEMO out before you consider purchasing this game.

*You can turn the announcer on or off in the options.

*64 bit operating systems only.

*Windows 7 might have issues playing the few video files in the game.

EASY TO LEARN


THE WORLD'S FASTEST BRAWLER


OUR ONLY GOAL WAS TO CREATE FUN


400+ LEVELS - 26 SKILLS - 4 ENDLESS SURVIVAL TOWERS
game_info.description: Stickman Fury: Two-Finger Death Punch is a high-octane rhythm brawler where you stand your ground against endless waves of stickman ninjas. You are the ultimate master of kung-fu, but you must remain centered. Enemies approach from the left and right. Wait for them to enter your attack range—indicated by the floor markers—and strike with precision. Missing an attack leaves you vulnerable. Build your combo meter to unleash fury and speed up your reflexes. It's not just about mashing buttons; it's about flow, timing, and rhythm.
game_info.controls:
- Left Arrow: Attack Left (hits enemies in left range)
- Right Arrow: Attack Right (hits enemies in right range)
- Space: Fury Blast (clears nearby enemies when Fury Meter is full)
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify basic collision detection and input response mechanics logic by simulating a cautious player.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test bot will monitor the distance of the nearest enemy on either side. It will trigger an attack input only when an enemy is well within the "guaranteed hit" zone (closer than the maximum range edge) to ensure hit registration is working correctly without relying on frame-perfect timing.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player character should successfully defeat the initial waves of enemies without missing, surviving for at least 30 seconds. This confirms that the range detection and attack mapping (Left/Right) are correctly implemented.

TEST_2.test_description: Stress test the game engine, particle system, and "perfect play" mechanics under high load.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot will read the game state to react on the exact frame an enemy enters the valid attack range. It will flawlessly execute multi-hit sequences if applicable and use the Special ability immediately when available.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should achieve an "S-Rank" style performance with a high combo count and zero damage taken. The game should maintain 60 FPS despite the high volume of particle effects and rapid state changes generated by the fast kills.
